candidates.row_label: Net Foreign Exchange Income - Business Revenue
candidates.why: Of the available candidates, this is an actual recurring revenue-related line item (FX business revenue), while 'Balancing Item - Revenue' is a technical balancing line, not an operating top-line.

Explicitly labeled as revenue but numerically appears to be a small balancing adjustment rather than the main top-line; used as a secondary fallback in case later logic prefers the label with 'Revenue'.

final_choice.row_label: Net Foreign Exchange Income - Business Revenue

variables.notes: This is a bank; true top-line (net interest income + net commissions/fees) is not directly available as a single candidate. Selected FX business revenue plus the balancing revenue line as best approximations, but this likely understates or misrepresents total revenue.
No COGS/cost of sales or equivalent production/service cost line is present in the candidate list, so COGS is set to 0 by design.

candidates.row_label: Net commissions and other operating income
candidates.why: This is income, not an operating expense; should not be treated as SG&A.
Income line, not overhead expense; excluded per SG&A rules.
Duplicate/income-type line; again not SG&A expense.
Classic SG&A component for a bank (staff/overhead personnel costs). Fits operating overhead definition and is not a total/subtotal.
Standard SG&A-type overhead bucket (non-interest, non-D&A, non-impairment operating expenses). Not labeled as a total and has its own detail line below; appropriate as SG&A component.

variables.notes: Selected the clear expense-side overhead components (personnel and other operating expenses). Excluded income lines from SG&A.
No R&D-related line appears in the candidate list; reasonable for a bank. XRD set to 0 by design.

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; not primary choice for XINT which should reflect expense.
Interest income line; excluded from priority for interest expense, but kept as a candidate reference.
Other interest/dividend income; not expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest & Dividend Income - Investment Securities Available for Sale/Held to Maturity
candidates.why: Interest income from securities; not expense.
Aggregated interest expense line for the bank (negative values). Best representation of XINT per instructions.
Component of interest expense on other borrowings; useful fallback if the main Interest Expenses line were missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest on debt to credit institutions
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component; secondary fallback for XINT.
Interest expense attributable to customer deposits; another component-level fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Narrow interest expense component on lease liabilities; lower-priority fallback.
Represents profit share to minorities, not an interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Hybrid Capital Owners share of profit after tax (Interest on hybrid)
candidates.why: Economically similar to interest on AT1/hybrid capital, but labeled as profit allocation after tax; could conceptually be interest-like but is not the core interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Profit after tax for non-controlling ownership interest
candidates.why: Share of profit to NCI, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; lowest-priority specific component.
Balance sheet asset, unrelated to interest expense.
Equity; not interest expense.
Equity; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on debt to credit institutions
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Prioritized the main consolidated interest expense line, followed by its key component expense lines as fallbacks. Interest income and equity/minority items were not selected.

candidates.row_label: Dividends from shares and other equity instruments
candidates.why: Income statement flow, not a stock of equity; not suitable as book equity.

candidates.row_label: Earnings/diluted earnings per average equity certificate (in NOK)
candidates.why: Per-share earnings metric, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Earnings/diluted earnings per equity certificate (in NOK)
candidates.why: Per-share earnings metric, not equity balance.
Asset holding of equity securities, not the bank’s own book equity.
Component of equity (similar to common stock) but not total equity; prefer the aggregate line for BE.
Component/other equity bucket; not total equity.
Component of equity (retained/other reserves); not the full equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Allocated to dividends and other equity capital
candidates.why: Allocation of profits, not total equity itself.
Explicit total equity line on the balance sheet; best representation of book equity/BE.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance sheet total equity line as BE. There appear to be two identical labels in the sheet but same concept; mapping is to that label.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to minorities (flow). Useful for MIB conceptually but the balance sheet stock is preferable for BE’s minority interest input.

candidates.row_label: Profit after tax for non-controlling ownership interest
candidates.why: Another income statement flow-level attribution to NCI; again, not the balance sheet stock.
Asset; unrelated to minority equity in the group.
Balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests; primary and most appropriate line for MIB.
Alternative label for the same minority/non-controlling interests equity; good secondary fallback.

variables.notes: Chose the balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests, with its alternate label as a fallback. Income statement minority interest lines were not used as the primary MIB measure.
